metadata.title: MacBookPro11,1 OpenCore Legacy Patcher Compatibility
metadata.description: Check MacBookPro11,1 OCLP planning notes for Sonoma, Sequoia, graphics, wireless, and official model support links.

checker.title: MacBookPro11,1 OCLP planning notes
checker.description: MacBookPro11,1 is a common Late 2013 / Mid 2014 13-inch MacBook Pro identifier. Verify the exact model and current OCLP notes before choosing a macOS target.

items.question: Is MacBookPro11,1 the same as every 2013 or 2014 MacBook Pro?
items.answer: No. Confirm the exact identifier in System Information before comparing support notes.

items.question: Should I choose the newest macOS automatically?
items.answer: No. Pick the version that balances app requirements, hardware caveats, and current OCLP release notes.
